title: 3D Bare Bones Mace (Spark/Essential mod animations ver)
description: A retexture of Lupin's Mace mod to fit the Bare Bones Style.
body:
A Retexture to Lupin's 3D mace mod that retextures it to fit the Bare Bones style. 

Instead of using the heavy core from the Bare Bones texture pack, I opted to use the one from the Spark/Essential mod animations.

Original mod: [https://modrinth.com/mod/awesome-3d-mace](https://modrinth.com/mod/awesome-3d-mace)
